title: Authentication Flow
content: I mapped out two core UX structures for Tremor's platform: the user authentication flow and the application navigation architecture. The auth flow covers account creation, login, credential recovery, and retry logic. The sitemap defines the full page hierarchy — from top-level sections down to modals, print views, and sub-pages within the Placements area.

images.caption: User Authentication Flow: The full auth flow — login, account creation, and credential recovery. Green nodes indicate success states, red indicate failure, with retry loops at each validation point.
Application Sitemap: The full navigation hierarchy, from top-level pages (dashboard, analytics, admin, settings) through the Placements sub-pages, modals, and print views.
